description: User hovers over the 'Papillon' listing card in the search results.
page_title: London • 300+ Caravans, Motorhomes & Campers to hire | Camplify
frame_description: Search results page for London showing multiple campervan listings.

description: User hovers over the 'Archie' listing card.
User hovers over 'The Mobile Retreat' listing card.
User hovers back over the 'Papillon' listing card before clicking.
User clicks on the 'Papillon' campervan listing card to view details.
The browser navigates to the detailed listing page for the 'Papillon' campervan.
frame_description: The screen transitions from search results to the specific listing page.

description: The 'Papillon' listing page finishes loading its content and images.
frame_description: The detailed listing page for 'Papillon' is displayed with a large image gallery at the top.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Save' button below the listing images.
User scrolls down to view the campervan description.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: User hovers over the 'Read more' link in the description section.
User clicks the 'Read more' link to expand the campervan description.
The description section expands to reveal the full text.
frame_description: The text area expands downwards to show more information.

description: User scrolls down through the 'Important stuff' and 'Amenities' sections.
frame_description: User reviews various sections of the listing page including hiring rules and features.

description: User clicks 'Read more' in the Amenities section to see the full list.
The Amenities section expands to show more items.
frame_description: The list of amenities expands to show additional features.

description: User scrolls down to the location map and availability calendar.
frame_description: The map and calendar sections come into view.

description: User hovers over dates in the November 2026 availability calendar.
User scrolls back up the page to re-read the description and rules.
frame_description: Page content moves downwards as user scrolls up.

description: User clicks and drags to highlight the text 'Travel to mainland Europe OK'.
User scrolls up and down the page, continuing to review the listing details and hiring rules.
frame_description: User continues to browse the page content before finishing the segment.
